news.title: Mirion Announces Earnings Release and Conference Call Date for First Quarter 2026
news.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mirion (NYSE: MIR) announced today that it will release financial results for first quarter 2026 after market close on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. Following the news release, the company will host a conference call the next day, Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 10:00 am ET to discuss the results. news.title: Mirion to Present at Citi's 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference
news.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mirion (NYSE: MIR) announced today that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Thomas Logan, and Chief Financial Officer and Medical Group President, Brian Schopfer, will present at Citi's 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference. The presentation will begin at 2:40 PM ET on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. The presentation will be webcast live at Mirion's Investor Relations Page where a webcast link will be displayed under the "Events and Presentations” section.

news.title: Mirion Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results; Provides Full Year 2026 Guidance
news.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mirion (“we” or the “company”) (NYSE: MIR), a global provider of radiation detection, measurement, analysis, and monitoring solutions to the nuclear, medical, defense, and research end markets, today announced results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. “Mirion concluded another successful year, highlighted by record orders, strong tailwinds from key strategic end-markets, and a broadening nuclear power portfolio,” commented Mirion's Chairman.
